deposit_type_code.text: ประเภทเงินฝาก

root.sql: SELECT DISTINCT sc_dep_m_creditor_item.seq_no, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no, sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name, pka_dep.fp_get_print_code(sc_dep_m_creditor_item.refer_to_deposit_doc_no , sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type ) as print_code, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.operate_date, '' as print_date, '' as money_type, '' as cheque_no, '' as bank_name, '' as branch_id, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.total_balance, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.int_amount, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.fee_amount, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.officer_id, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.working_day FROM sc_dep_m_creditor_item, sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_dep_m_rule WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ) and ( sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ASC
